title: Add Tasks
description: Add Pages Jaunes search URLs as tasks for scraping French business directory listings

content.introduction: Add Pages Jaunes (French Yellow Pages) search URLs to your squid for scraping business directory listings. The scraper extracts company information including contact details, addresses, business registration numbers (SIRET/SIREN), and social media profiles from France's largest business directory.

taskFormat.title: Task Format
taskFormat.content: Each task should contain a URL from a Pages Jaunes search results page. Search for businesses by category and location on the website, then use those search URLs as tasks.

rows.description: Pages Jaunes search results page URL

supportedUrls.title: Supported URL Formats
supportedUrls.content: The scraper supports Pages Jaunes search URLs:
list: Filtered searches with specific business types

proTips.content: Pages Jaunes URLs use department codes (e.g., 'paris-75' for Paris). Apply location filters on the website to get properly formatted URLs.
Search by specific business categories (boulanger, plombier, restaurant) to get targeted results for your industry research.

seo.title: Add Tasks - Pages Jaunes Companies Search Export - Lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add Pages Jaunes search URLs as tasks for scraping French business directory listings with SIRET, contact details, and company information.
